Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 176 

NCVRD_DAYS 

LABEL: Medicaid Non-covered Days Count 

DESCRIPTION: The number of days of inpatient or institutional long-term care not covered by the payer for this 
sequence as qualified by the payer organization. 

SHORT NAME: NCVRD_DAYS 

LONG NAME: NCVRD_DAYS 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): IP header 
LT header 

VALUES: 0–XXXX; may
